title: NAHosMIP experimental protocol
author: Jackson, Laura
license_note: Zenodo record metadata license field: cc-by-4.0
description:
This package contains details of the experimental protocol for the North Atlantic Hosing Model Intercomparison Project (NAHosMIP). See https://www.tipes.dk/na-hosing-mip/  

 The experimental protocol is described in detail in Jackson et al, (2022), Understanding AMOC stability: the North Atlantic Hosing Model Intercomparison Project. GMD [Full reference to come] 

 The files attached are: 

 create_hosing_GC3LL.py - python code to create a netcdf file with uniform hosing of a given rate (ie 0.3 Sv). This file is set up to read in grid data for HadGEM3-GC3-1LL 

 create_hosing_GC3LL_grl_v2.py - python code to create a netcdf file with hosing around Greenland of a given rate (ie 0.1 Sv). This file is set up to read in grid data for HadGEM3-GC3-1LL and has some grid locations that are specific to the model. 

 hosing.nc - example of uniform hosing of 0.3Sv for HadGEM3-GC3-1LL grid 

 hosing_grl.nc - example of hosing around Greenland of 0.1Sv for HadGEM3-GC3-1LL grid 

 check_hosing_GC31LL.py - script to check hosing file and code for compensation of the hosing throughout the volume. 

 mesh_mask_HighresMIP_eORCA1_extr.nc - grid data for HadGEM3-GC3-1LL 

 SSS_GC31LL.nc example surface salinity data for HadGEM3-GC3-1LL
